description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in Rezervi Generic 0.9 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the root parameter to (1) datumVonDatumBis.inc.php, (2) footer.inc.php, (3) header.inc.php, and (4) stylesheets.php in templates/; and (5) wochenuebersicht.inc.php, (6) monatsuebersicht.inc.php, (7) jahresuebersicht.inc.php, and (8) tagesuebersicht.inc.php in belegungsplan/.
